originalBehavior: EVENT_NEWDAY is an EVENT_NEXTDAY label reached from EVENT_TURNEND.
The disabled SOMETIMES_SHE_COMES_BACK block is commented out in original source and must not be wired.
Active behavior is ordered calls: MORNING_COWGIRL, HAPPY_BIRTHDAY, ONESHO, PARTICULAR_DATE, START_COOCKING, then RETURN 1.
patchSteps: Add a small applyNewDayEventHooks helper in src/features/turnEnd.ts.
The helper should record the ordered callee ids in persistent turn/world event state or effects, without implementing callee internals.
Call the helper from endTurn in the turn-end flow.
Add smoke assertions in tools/m35_turn_long_smoke.ts that the ordered EVENT_NEWDAY callee ids are recorded.
Create data/implementation-packets/m35-event-newday.worker-result.json using the prefilled accounting, updating implemented evidence for the actual patch.
doNotDo: Do not wire SOMETIMES_SHE_COMES_BACK; the source call is commented out.

implementedEffects.implementation: applyNewDayEventHooks returns after recording active callee order
